parents.subject: LU-9667 lnet: Add LNet net sysfs structure

commit.subject: LU-9667 lnet: Userspace control to show lnet ni stats
commit.message:
LU-9667 lnet: Userspace control to show lnet ni stats

Adding lustre_lnet_stats_ni() function to show
lnet NI's statistics.

Adding helper functions in liblnetconfig.c to traverse
the lnet ni sysfs structure and show their statistics.
With this change, lnetctl utility can be used to run
below example commands to show the NI stats.

lnetctl net stats
lnetctl net stats --nid <nid1>,<nid2>,<nid3>
lnetctl net stats --nid 192.168.56.[101-103]@tcp
lnetctl net stats --net tcp

Change-Id: I2b4e7e95f738fcf573cddef3f743283149325750
Test-Parameters: forbuildonly
Signed-off-by: Sonia Sharma <sharmaso@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/32786
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Amir Shehata <ashehata@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
